headline: Has Baxter International (BAX) Overreacted After Recent 10.9% Weekly Share Price Jump
summary: Wondering whether Baxter International at around US$19.18 is a bargain or a value trap? This article walks through what the current price might actually imply. The stock has moved sharply in the short term, with a 10.9% gain over the past week and 5.6% over the past month, despite being down 1.6% year to date and declining 35.5% over the past year and 50.2% over three years. These moves sit against an ongoing evergreen interest in Baxter International as a large healthcare equipment company...
